title: trifolium intertextum
intro: Trifolium intertextum, also known as the woolly clover, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, characterized by its white or pink flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Trifolium intertextum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Trifolium intertextum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
